home.title: Software Developer

journey.title: About Me
journey.about: Full-Stack Developer with one year of professional experience building web applications, REST APIs, and mobile products. Specialized in Python and JavaScript ecosystems — React, Angular, Node.js, PHP. Built and deployed a Go backend on Railway for this portfolio. Open to full-time and freelance opportunities locally and internationally.
